name: Boombox, Skateboard, And Coil - PHIGHTING!
description:
wanting to be friends with the “cool guys” who you always see around.

ੈ✩‧₊˚༺sneak peak༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

After working at Slingshots cafe for while, you were sure you’ve seen every type of person. Mean ones, kind ones, ones who were quiet, and those who are loud. And yet, these group of playgrounders were a special type of person. They had this effortless swagger to their walk, a sly way of talking, and they seemed to breeze through life like it was nothing. And they always had a schedule of coming to the cafe, every Friday at 7pm.
